MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercedes Gaving for The John Stewart Company, who is present.
Greg Iskander, Limited Scope Attorney, for Defendant Adriana Sparkuhl, who is present.

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the agreement, which was filed with the court for premises located at 328 D Yerba Buena Road, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document. Trial date of 12/22/08 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
